text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's Silence Suzuka! She's absolutely
unstoppable! That's yet another victory she's
seized!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Silence Suzuka claiming victory after
victory, the public is going absolutely wild over
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her increase in popularity leads to more and
more appearances on television and in
magazines, and one day, amidst this coverage...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for interviewing with me
today. Good luck with your races! I'll be cheering
you on!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, actually, I've been wondering... Not that it's
a big deal or anything, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Why am I being asked to participate in so many
interviews lately?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And it's not just interviews either. I'm being asked
to go on radio shows and do photo shoots more
often than before as well...
choice_data_list: (Wait... Does she really not know why?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka can be a little oblivious, so it's
possible she genuinely hasn't realized she's in the
limelight right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking it'll be faster to show rather than tell, I
hand her a magazine that was delivered to me
yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Isn't this one of the magazines that
interviewed me?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No, not yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Splashed across the cover are the words "The
Umamusume Speeding Toward Limitless Success!"
The article continues inside...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
"We've asked Silence Suzuka's fans for their
opinions on their favorite Umamusume, and this is
what they had to say!"

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: "She wins every race she runs! There's no way anyone can even dream of defeating her right now!"

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
"She was amazing at the autumn Tenno Sho! I felt
like I was dreaming as I watched her run."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
"I'm going to see her next race no matter what!
She's our bright and brilliant dream!"

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: "Thank you so much, Silence Suzuka."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This is incredible... There are so many supportive
comments...
choice_data_list: They're all thrilled with how you've been doing.
They're all thrilled with how you've been doing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Have I... been doing that well?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start counting off the number of graded races
she's won, starting with the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: N-no way. Have I really won that many?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, actually, I'm so focused on staying in front
of the pack that I don't really keep track of how
many times I win.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
My body's been feeling so light lately, all I can
think of is how fun it is to run.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I could run on and on forever if I
wanted...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I guess that's why I had no idea my running has
inspired so many people.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
In fact, they're even happier about my victories
than I am.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's a surprise, but... a very welcome one.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's an honor to bear the dreams of so many.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm going to keep running... forever and ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a small smile on her face, Silence Suzuka
continues reading through the magazine
comments.
